---
title: "Frances Lin"
subtitle: "PhD in Statistics; Ex-SWE, ML Intern"
image: images/profile.jpg
about:
  template: solana
  links: 
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/franceslinyc
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/franceslinyc/
---

> 📣 Seeking opportunities in data science, machine learning, or AI roles starting in Feb 2026 or later!

I hold a PhD in Statistics from Oregon State University. I was previously a Software Engineer Intern at [Posit, PBC](https://posit.co) (formerly RStudio, Inc).

Outside of work, I enjoy skiing, traveling, being outdoors, and watching thriller or dark comedy films and series on Netflix.
